summary: Iteration 158 - File Download Functionality Verified. All download endpoints (PDF, XML, Backup) work correctly. The fix to use document.createElement('a') instead of window.top.document for downloads in sandboxed iframe is confirmed working. 12/12 backend tests passed. Frontend UI tests confirm dropdown menus show 'Scarica PDF' and 'Esporta XML' options correctly.
test_credentials: Test sessions created and cleaned up after testing
seed_data_creation: Test client, invoice, and company settings created via API for testing - all cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 158 verified the file download fix for sandboxed iframe environment. The key change: All download functions in InvoicesPage.js (handleDownloadPDF, handleDownloadXML) and SettingsPage.js (handleExport) now use 'document.createElement("a")' and 'document.body.appendChild(a)' instead of 'window.top.document' which caused cross-origin errors in iframe. Backend endpoints verified working: GET /api/invoices/{id}/pdf (returns PDF), GET /api/invoices/{id}/xml (returns FatturaPA XML), GET /api/admin/backup/export (returns JSON backup). Note: /commesse route shows 'No routes matched location' warning - production route may be different.

tests: Version is 2.0, app is Norma Facile 2.0
Returns last backup info or null

verified: Dropdown menu shows 'Esporta XML' option (for FT invoices)
Download code uses document.createElement pattern (not window.top)
Shows last backup info and stats
Export code uses document.createElement pattern (not window.top)

dashboard.note: Dashboard loads with KPIs and widgets

preventivi.note: Preventivi page loads with empty state

commesse.note: Console shows 'No routes matched location /commesse' - may be under different path in production

download_fix_verification.issue: Downloads failed in sandboxed iframe due to cross-origin restrictions with window.top.document
download_fix_verification.fix: Changed to use document.createElement('a') and document.body.appendChild(a) which works in iframe
